channel.title: Vendor-Neutral on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Vendor-Neutral on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: commandline: Introducing Agent Control Specification: Portable runtime governance for AI Agents
item.description:
ACS is presented as an open, vendor-neutral standard for applying runtime governance across the AI agent lifecycle. It is designed to work independently of the agent framework, runtime, or policy engine.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog
